    \n\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n\r\n\n\n" ### Ran Playwright code ```js await (async (page) => { let searchBody = ''; page.on('response', async res => { if (res.url().includes('?pid=search') && res.request().method() === 'POST') { try { searchBody = await res.text(); } catch(e) {} } }); await page.goto('https://berlin.r.mikatiming.com/2025/'); await page.waitForTimeout(1000); await page.evaluate(() => { [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b => b.textContent.includes('Accept All'))?.click(); }); await page.waitForTimeout(500); await page.fill('input[name="search[name]"]', 'Müller'); await page.click('button[type="submit"]'); await page.waitForTimeout(5000); // Write body to a temp location return searchBody; })(page); ``` ### Events - New console entries: .playwright-mcp/console-2026-06-18T19-35-08-842Z.log#L77-L85
